{# Template for blog posts. Selected by conf.py for all blog/* pages. Renders a back-link and date/author meta line from frontmatter. The H1 title comes from the markdown body (# Title). #} {% extends "page.html" %} {% macro format_author(raw) -%} {%- for part in raw.split(",") -%} {%- set name = part.strip() -%} {%- if name.startswith("@") -%} {{ name }} {%- else -%} {{ name }} {%- endif -%} {%- if not loop.last %}, {% endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- endmacro %} {% block body %}
{{ super() }}
{% endblock %} {% block content %} ← Tesseract Blog {% if meta and meta.get("blog_date") %}
{{ meta["blog_date"] }} · {{ format_author(meta.get("blog_author", "")) }}
{% endif %} {{ body }} {% endblock %}
